news.t: Invesco Expands BulletShares Suite With New Treasury ETFs
Invesco Increases Optionality of its BulletShares Defined Maturity ETF Suite by adding Treasury Bond ETFs

overview.description: The Invesco Bulletshares 2031 Treasury Bond ETF (BSTV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of US Treasury bonds maturing in 2031. The fund seeks to provide exposure to a defined-maturity Treasury bond portfolio that transitions to cash and cash equivalents as its holdings mature. BSTV was launched on Jun 10, 2026 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE BulletShares US Treasury Bond 2031 Index

data.title: Invesco Expands BulletShares Suite With New Treasury ETFs
data.text: On June 10, Invesco launched the new BulletShares Treasury Bond ETFs. These funds offer target maturities between 2027 to 2031, with an expense ratio of seven basis points.

data.title: Invesco Increases Optionality of its BulletShares Defined Maturity ETF Suite by adding Treasury Bond ETFs
data.text: New Treasury BulletShares ETFs complement Invesco's investment grade corporate, high yield corporate and municipal bond BulletShares offerings, further strengthening Invesco's defined maturity ETF lin...
